config.title: Obiekt klienta #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
#include "50101"
function fopen if not std_fopen() then fopen = false exit function end if section_fopen THIS_FILE #ifdef _KES getDataFromKlient #endif end function
function fsave dim bSave: bSave=std_fsave()
if not bSave then section_fsave THIS_FILE end if end function
function fclose section_fclose THIS_FILE end function
#include "50222" #include "50200"
QVE_REF_OPEN_FORM(CTRLID_KLIENT,klob_pKlient) QVE_REF_OPEN_FORM(CTRLID_KLIENT_JO,klob_pKlientJO) QVE_REF_OPEN_FORM(CTRLID_KLIENT_PRACOWNIK,klob_pKlientPracownik) QVE_REF_OPEN_FORM(CTRLID_PRACOWNIK_DED,klob_pPracownik) QVE_REF_OPEN_FORM(CTRLID_PRODUKT,klob_pProdukt)
dim g_idRoot : g_idRoot = clng(0)
function c##CTRLID_LABEL_NAZWA##_ongetdata(byref oLabel) if page_.rootidobj <> g_idRoot then g_idRoot = page_.rootidobj on_root_change end if oLabel.text = "Nazwa" end function
sub block_edit_row(iEditIdent,bEdit,bRead,bRef) page_.ctrl(iEditIdent).parent.parent.disable = not bEdit if bRef then page_.ctrl(iEditIdent).nextelement.disable = not bEdit end if if not bEdit then page_.ctrl(iEditIdent).parent.parent.hide = not bRead page_.ctrl(iEditIdent).backcolor = page_.ctrl(9997).backcolor end if end sub
sub on_root_change()
#ifdef _SECURITY if HAR(UAR_KLOB_SEC_ATRYBUTY_EDIT) then else dim bCanRead : bCanRead = HAR(UAR_KLOB_SEC_ATRYBUTY_READ)
block_edit_row CTRLID_EDIT_OKRES_GWAR,false,bCanRead,false block_edit_row CTRLID_EDIT_TYP_CENTR,false,bCanRead,false block_edit_row CTRLID_EDIT_OSOBA_ODP,false,bCanRead,true block_edit_row CTRLID_EDIT_WLASC_KODU,false,bCanRead,true
block_edit_row CTRLID_INSTALATOR,false,bCanRead,false block_edit_row CTRLID_USER_FIELD_9,false,bCanRead,false block_edit_row CTRLID_USER_FIELD_10,false,bCanRead,false
end if
#endif end sub
function c##CTRLID_KLIENT_JO##_onsuggquery(byref pEditCtrl,byval strEnteredVal,byref strWhere,byref strOrder,byref strJoin) if page_.root.klob_pKlient is nothing then exit function end if if strWhere <> "" then strWhere = strWhere + " and " end if strWhere = strWhere + "(pKlient = " + cstr(page_.root.klob_pKlient.idobj) + ")" end function
function c##CTRLID_KLIENT_PRACOWNIK##_onsuggquery(byref pEditCtrl,byval strEnteredVal,byref strWhere,byref strOrder,byref strJoin) if page_.root.klob_pKlient is nothing then exit function end if if strWhere <> "" then strWhere = strWhere + " and " end if strWhere = strWhere + "(pKlient = " + cstr(page_.root.klob_pKlient.idobj) + ")" end function
#ifdef _RAND setglobprofile GLOBPROF_EXTRAFIELDNAME2, "Data zakończenia lizingu"
QVE_USER_FIELD_NAME(CTRLID_EX1,1,GLOBPROF_EXTRAFIELDNAME1) QVE_USER_FIELD_NAME(CTRLID_EX2,2,GLOBPROF_EXTRAFIELDNAME2) QVE_USER_FIELD_NAME(CTRLID_EX3,3,GLOBPROF_EXTRAFIELDNAME3) QVE_USER_FIELD_NAME(CTRLID_EX4,4,GLOBPROF_EXTRAFIELDNAME4) QVE_USER_FIELD_NAME(CTRLID_EX5,5,GLOBPROF_EXTRAFIELDNAME5) QVE_USER_FIELD_NAME(CTRLID_EX6,6,GLOBPROF_EXTRAFIELDNAME6)
function c##CTRLID_EXTRA2##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl):c##CTRLID_EXTRA2##_ongetdata = true if page_.root.strExtra2 = "" or page_.root.strExtra2 = "????-??-??" then oCtrl.value = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate() exit function end if oCtrl.value = CDate(page_.root.strExtra2) end function
function c##CTRLID_EXTRA2##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl,value):c##CTRLID_EXTRA2##_ondataentered = true page_.root.strExtra2 = trans_.afc.display.fulldate(value) end function
#else
QVE_USER_FIELD_NAME(CTRLID_EX1,1,GLOBPROF_EXTRAFIELDNAME1) QVE_USER_FIELD_NAME(CTRLID_EX2,2,GLOBPROF_EXTRAFIELDNAME2) QVE_USER_FIELD_NAME(CTRLID_EX3,3,GLOBPROF_EXTRAFIELDNAME3) QVE_USER_FIELD_NAME(CTRLID_EX4,4,GLOBPROF_EXTRAFIELDNAME4) QVE_USER_FIELD_NAME(CTRLID_EX5,5,GLOBPROF_EXTRAFIELDNAME5) QVE_USER_FIELD_NAME(CTRLID_EX6,6,GLOBPROF_EXTRAFIELDNAME6)
#endif
function c##CTRLID_RADIO_ZASADY_OBSLUGI##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl):c##CTRLID_RADIO_ZASADY_OBSLUGI##_ongetdata=false dim zo : zo = page_.root.n5klient_obiekt_get_zasady_obslugi() oCtrl.value = clng(zo) end function
function c##CTRLID_RADIO_ZASADY_OBSLUGI##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue):c##CTRLID_RADIO_ZASADY_OBSLUGI##_ondataentered=false page_.root.strExtra1 = page_.root.n5klient_obiekt_compose_extra1(oCtrl.value , page_.ctrl(CTRLID_KOLEJNE_ZADANIE).value , page_.ctrl(CTRLID_LICZNIKREQ).value ) c##CTRLID_RADIO_ZASADY_OBSLUGI##_ondataentered=true end function
function c##CTRLID_KOLEJNE_ZADANIE##_ongetdata(byref pCtrl) : c##CTRLID_KOLEJNE_ZADANIE##_ongetdata = true pCtrl.value = page_.root.n5klient_obiekt_get_kolejne_zadanie() end function
function c##CTRLID_KOLEJNE_ZADANIE##_ondataentered(byref pCtrl , byval newValue) : c##CTRLID_KOLEJNE_ZADANIE##_ondataentered = true page_.root.strExtra1 = page_.root.n5klient_obiekt_compose_extra1(page_.ctrl(CTRLID_RADIO_ZASADY_OBSLUGI).value , page_.ctrl(CTRLID_KOLEJNE_ZADANIE).value , page_.ctrl(CTRLID_LICZNIKREQ).value ) end function
function c##CTRLID_LICZNIKREQ##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl): c##CTRLID_LICZNIKREQ##_ongetdata=true oCtrl.value = page_.root.n5klient_obiekt_get_licznik_wymagany() end function
function c##CTRLID_LICZNIKREQ##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue) page_.root.strExtra1 = page_.root.n5klient_obiekt_compose_extra1(page_.ctrl(CTRLID_RADIO_ZASADY_OBSLUGI).value , page_.ctrl(CTRLID_KOLEJNE_ZADANIE).value , page_.ctrl(CTRLID_LICZNIKREQ).value ) c##CTRLID_LICZNIKREQ##_ondataentered=true end function
#ifdef APPCONFIG_PROTOKOLY function c##CTRLID_KOSZT_LEASING##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl): c##CTRLID_KOSZT_LEASING##_ongetdata = true if page_.root.klob_strTel2 <> "" then oCtrl.value = CCur(Replace(page_.root.klob_strTel2,".",",")) else oCtrl.value = CCur(0) end if end function
function c##CTRLID_KOSZT_LEASING##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue) page_.root.klob_strTel2 = CStr(newValue) c##CTRLID_KOSZT_LEASING##_ondataentered = true end function #endif
sub getDataFromKlient() if trans_.isvar(GVAR_ID_KLIENT_ZLEC) then if trans_.var(GVAR_ID_KLIENT_ZLEC) > clng(0) then dim oKlient: set oKlient = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT,clng(trans_.var(GVAR_ID_KLIENT_ZLEC))) with page_.root set .klob_pKlient = oKlient .klob_strUlica = oKlient.strUlica .klob_strNrDomu = oKlient.strNrDomu .klob_strNrLokalu = oKlient.strNrLokalu .klob_strKod = oKlient.strKod .klob_strPoczta = oKlient.strPoczta set .klob_pMiejscowosc = oKlient.pMiejscowosc set .klob_pKraj = oKlient.pKraj .klob_strTel1 = oKlient.strTel1 .klob_strFax = oKlient.strFax .klob_strEmail = oKlient.strEmail .klob_strWWW = oKlient.strWWW end with end if end if end sub

page.body:
QXF_BEGIN QXS_BEGIN_FLAT(SECID_MAIN,Informacje podstawowe,FORM_SPAN) QXR_EDIT_REF_OPEN_REQ(Klient,CTRLID_KLIENT,-1,40,PICTURE_CHOICE_N5KLIENT,klob_pKlient,strNazwa,CRSR_DEFAULT,RCELL_SPAN) QXR_EDIT_REF_CQ(Jedn. org.,CTRLID_KLIENT_JO,40,PICTURE_CHOICE_N5_KLIENT_JEDN_ORG,klob_pKlientJO,strNazwa,RCELL_SPAN) QXR_EDIT_REF_CQ(Pracownik klienta,CTRLID_KLIENT_PRACOWNIK,40,PICTURE_CHOICE_N5KLIENT_PRACOWNIK,klob_pKlientPracownik,strNazwisko,RCELL_SPAN) QXR_EDIT_REF_OPEN(Produkt,CTRLID_PRODUKT,-1,40,PICTURE_CHOICE_N5PRODUKT,klob_pProdukt,strNazwa,CRSR_DEFAULT,RCELL_SPAN)
QXC_LABEL_CUSTOM_REQ(CTRLID_LABEL_NAZWA,5,1) QXC_EDIT_FIELD(-1,40,klob_strNazwa,RCELL_SPAN)
#ifndef APPCONFIG_PROTOKOLY QXR_EDIT_FIELD_REQ(Indeks,-1,10,klob_strIndeks,RCELL_SPAN) #endif #ifdef APPCONFIG_PROTOKOLY QXR_EDIT_FIELD_REQ(Indeks,-1,20,klob_strIndeks,RCELL_SPAN) #ifndef _KES
QXC_LABEL_REQ(Licznik,1) QXC_CURRENCY_FIELD(-1,20,4,,curExtra5,RCELL_SPAN)
#endif QXR_EDIT_FIELD(Konto,-1,20,klob_strTel3##,1)
QXC_LABEL(Koszt dojazdu,1) QXC_CURRENCY_FIELD(-1,20,2,,curExtra4,RCELL_SPAN)
#ifndef _KES
QXC_LABEL(Koszt lizingu,1) QXC_CURRENCY_CUSTOM(CTRLID_KOSZT_LEASING,20,2,,RCELL_SPAN)
#ifdef _RAND XFDATEFIELD(Data rozpoczęcia lizingu,dExtra3)
QXC_LABEL_CUSTOM(CTRLID_EX2,15,1)
QXE_DATE_FIELD_CUSTOM(CTRLID_EXTRA2)
#endif
QXC_LABEL(Zasady obslugi,1)
umowa najmu umowa serwisowa umowa gwarancyjna obsługa posprzedażna
QXC_LABEL(Kolejne zadanie za miesięcy,1) QXC_CURRENCY_CUSTOM(CTRLID_KOLEJNE_ZADANIE,10,0,,1)
Licznik wymagany
#endif
#endif QXS_END_FLAT(FORM_SPAN) QXX_ADRES_C(SECID_ADRES,,Adres,klob_,,,FORM_SPAN) #ifdef APPCONFIG_PROTOKOLY QXS_BEGIN_OPT(SECID_TELEKOM,NAPIS_ATF,FORM_SPAN) QXR_EDIT_FIELD(Telefon 1,-1,20,klob_strTel1##,1) QXR_EDIT_FIELD(Fax,-1,20,klob_strFax##,1) XFOPTEMAIL(E-mail,klob_strEmail##) XFOPTWWW(WWW,klob_strWWW##) QXS_END_OPT(FORM_SPAN) #else QXX_TELEKOM_C(SECID_TELEKOM,klob_,,,FORM_SPAN) #endif QXS_BEGIN_OPT(SECID_PRAC_DED,PRACOWNIK_DEDYKOWANY,FORM_SPAN) QXR_EDIT_REF_OPEN(PRACOWNIK_DEDYKOWANY,CTRLID_PRACOWNIK_DED,-1,40,PICTURE_CHOICE_N5PRACOWNIK,klob_pPracownik,strNazwisko,CRSR_DEFAULT,RCELL_SPAN) QXS_END_OPT(FORM_SPAN)
QXS_MULTILINE(SECID_UWAGI,CTRLID_UWAGI,klob_strUwagi,Uwagi,FORM_SPAN)
#ifdef _SECURITY QXS_BEGIN_OPT(SECID_USERFIELDS,Atrybuty,FORM_SPAN) QXR_EDIT_FIELD(Okres gwarancji,CTRLID_EDIT_OKRES_GWAR,20,klob_strUF12,RCELL_SPAN) QXR_EDIT_FIELD(Typ centrali,CTRLID_EDIT_TYP_CENTR,20,klob_strUF11,RCELL_SPAN) QXR_EDIT_REF(Osoba odpowiedzialna,CTRLID_EDIT_OSOBA_ODP,40,PICTURE_CHOICE_N5KLIENT_PRACOWNIK,klob_pUFPracKlient13,strNazwisko,CRSR_DEFAULT,RCELL_SPAN) QXR_EDIT_REF(Właściciel gl. kodu,CTRLID_EDIT_WLASC_KODU,40,PICTURE_CHOICE_N5KLIENT_PRACOWNIK,klob_pUFPracKlient14,strNazwisko,CRSR_DEFAULT,RCELL_SPAN) QXR_EDIT_FIELD(Czas dojazdu,-1,20,klob_strCzasDojazdu,RCELL_SPAN) QXS_END_OPT(FORM_SPAN) QXS_MULTILINE(SECID_INSTALATOR,CTRLID_INSTALATOR,klob_strInstalator,Instalator systemu,FORM_SPAN) QXS_MULTILINE(SECID_USER_FIELD_9,CTRLID_USER_FIELD_9,klob_strUF9,Zmiany w systemie,FORM_SPAN) QXS_MULTILINE(SECID_USER_FIELD_10,CTRLID_USER_FIELD_10,klob_strUF10,Serwisy,FORM_SPAN) QXS_BEGIN_OPT(SECID_POWIADAMIANIE,Powiadamianie,FORM_SPAN)
QXC_LABEL(Osoba do powiadomienia,1) QXC_LABEL(Telefon,1)
QXC_EDIT_FIELD(-1,30,klob_strOsPow1,1) QXC_EDIT_FIELD(-1,20,klob_strOsPowTel1,1)
QXC_EDIT_FIELD(-1,30,klob_strOsPow2,1) QXC_EDIT_FIELD(-1,20,klob_strOsPowTel2,1)
QXC_EDIT_FIELD(-1,30,klob_strOsPow3,1) QXC_EDIT_FIELD(-1,20,klob_strOsPowTel3,1)
QXC_EDIT_FIELD(-1,30,klob_strOsPow4,1) QXC_EDIT_FIELD(-1,20,klob_strOsPowTel4,1)
QXC_EDIT_FIELD(-1,30,klob_strOsPow5,1) QXC_EDIT_FIELD(-1,20,klob_strOsPowTel5,1)
QXS_END_OPT(FORM_SPAN) #endif #ifndef APPCONFIG_PROTOKOLY QXS_BEGIN_OPT(SECID_EXTRA,Pola użytkownika,FORM_SPAN)
QXC_LABEL_CUSTOM(CTRLID_EX1,15,1) QXC_EDIT_FIELD(-1,40,strExtra1,RCELL_SPAN)
QXC_LABEL_CUSTOM(CTRLID_EX2,15,1) QXC_EDIT_FIELD(-1,40,strExtra2,RCELL_SPAN)
QXC_LABEL_CUSTOM(CTRLID_EX3,15,1) QXC_DATE_FIELD(-1,dExtra3,RCELL_SPAN)
QXC_LABEL_CUSTOM(CTRLID_EX4,15,1) QXC_CURRENCY_FIELD(-1,20,4,,curExtra4,RCELL_SPAN)
QXC_LABEL_CUSTOM(CTRLID_EX5,15,1) QXC_CURRENCY_FIELD(-1,20,4,,curExtra5,RCELL_SPAN)
QXC_LABEL_CUSTOM(CTRLID_EX6,15,1) QXC_EDIT_REF(-1,40,PICTURE_CHOICE_ELEMENT,pKwalifikatorEX,strNazwa,CRSR_DEFAULT,RCELL_SPAN)
QXS_END_OPT(FORM_SPAN) #else QXS_BEGIN_OPT(SECID_EXTRA,Pola użytkownika,FORM_SPAN) #ifndef _RAND
QXC_LABEL_CUSTOM(CTRLID_EX2,15,1) QXC_EDIT_FIELD(-1,40,strExtra2,RCELL_SPAN)
QXC_LABEL_CUSTOM(CTRLID_EX3,15,1) QXC_DATE_FIELD(-1,dExtra3,RCELL_SPAN)
QXC_LABEL_CUSTOM(CTRLID_EX5,15,1) QXC_CURRENCY_FIELD(-1,20,4,,curExtra5,RCELL_SPAN)
#endif
QXC_LABEL_CUSTOM(CTRLID_EX6,15,1) QXC_EDIT_REF(-1,40,PICTURE_CHOICE_ELEMENT,pKwalifikatorEX,strNazwa,CRSR_DEFAULT,RCELL_SPAN)
QXS_END_OPT(FORM_SPAN) #endif QXF_END
